debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
hPerm : l1.Perm l2
idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 ≤ l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 ≤ l2.length
elt : α
⊢ (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt)

failed_attempts:
apply List.Perm.insert_of_mem
      · apply List.mem_insertIdx_self
      · apply List.Perm.mem_iff_mem.mpr hPerm
        apply List.mem_insertIdx_self

rw [← List.Perm.insert_inj_right hPerm, ← List.Perm.insert_inj_right rfl]
      exact List.Perm.insert_elt elt _ _

have hlen : l1.length = l2.length := hPerm.length_eq
  rw [← List.Perm.insert_of_mem _ _ hPerm, ← List.Perm.insert_of_mem _ _ hPerm]
  exact List.Perm.refl _

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
    apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
  have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
    apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
  exact h1.trans (List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans h2.symm

have : l1.length = l2.length := hPerm.length_eq
    rw [← this] at hidx2
    apply List.Perm.insert_of_mem
    · apply List.mem_insertIdx_self
    · apply List.Perm.insert_of_mem
      · apply List.mem_insertIdx_self
      · exact hPerm.symm

have hlen : l1.length = l2.length := hPerm.length_eq
      rw [← List.Perm.insert_back_elt _ _ elt, ← List.Perm.insert_back_elt _ _ elt]
      exact hPerm.insertNth_inj (by simp [hlen, hidx1]) (by simp [hlen.symm, hidx2])

have h1 : l1.length = l2.length := hPerm.length_eq
  have h2 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).length = (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).length := by
    simp [List.insertIdx_length, h1]
  apply List.Perm.insert_of_mem
  · apply List.mem_insertIdx_self
  · apply List.Perm.mem_iff.2 hPerm
    apply List.mem_insertIdx_of_mem
    apply List.mem_of_length_le hidx1

have hlen : l1.length = l2.length := hPerm.length_eq
      rw [← List.Perm.insert_of_mem _ _ hPerm, ← List.Perm.insert_of_mem _ _ hPerm]
      exact List.Perm.refl _

have : l1.length = l2.length := hPerm.length_eq
      rw [← this] at hidx2
      apply List.Perm.insert_erase_insert
      · exact hPerm
      · exact hidx1
      · exact hidx2

have h1 : l1.length = l2.length := hPerm.length_eq
  have h2 : l1.insertIdx idx1 elt ~ l1 ++ [elt] := by
    apply List.Perm.insertIdx_append
  have h3 : l2.insertIdx idx2 elt ~ l2 ++ [elt] := by
    apply List.Perm.insertIdx_append
  have h4 : l1 ++ [elt] ~ l2 ++ [elt] := hPerm.append_right [elt]
  exact h2.trans (h4.trans h3.symm)

have h1 : l1.length = l2.length := hPerm.length_eq
      have h2 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).length = (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).length := by
        simp [List.insertIdx_length, h1]
      apply List.Perm.insert_of_mem
      · apply List.mem_insertIdx_self
      · apply List.Perm.mem_iff.2 hPerm
        apply List.mem_insertIdx_of_mem
        apply List.mem_of_length_le hidx1
      · apply List.mem_insertIdx_self

rw [← List.Perm.append_right_inj, ← List.Perm.append_right_inj]
      simp_all [List.insertIdx_append, hPerm]

have h1 : l1.length = l2.length := hPerm.length_eq
      have h2 : l1.insertIdx idx1 elt ~ l1 ++ [elt] := by
        apply List.Perm.insertIdx_append
      have h3 : l2.insertIdx idx2 elt ~ l2 ++ [elt] := by
        apply List.Perm.insertIdx_append
      have h4 : l1 ++ [elt] ~ l2 ++ [elt] := hPerm.append_right _
      exact h2.trans (h4.trans h3.symm)

rw [← List.Perm.append_right_inj, ← List.Perm.append_right_inj]
      simp_all [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop]
      <;> apply List.Perm.trans _ hPerm
      <;> apply List.Perm.take_drop_append

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
      have h3 : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        apply List.Perm.cons; assumption
      exact h1.trans (h3.trans h2.symm)

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
      exact h1.trans (List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans h2.symm

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
        assumption
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
        assumption
      have h3 : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        apply List.Perm.cons
        assumption
      exact h1.trans (h3.trans h2.symm)

rw [← List.Perm.append_right_inj, ← List.Perm.append_right_inj]
      simp_all [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop]
      <;> apply List.Perm.take_drop_append

apply List.Perm.insert_of_mem
      · apply List.mem_insertIdx_self
      · apply List.Perm.symm
        apply List.Perm.insert_of_mem
        · apply List.mem_insertIdx_self
        · exact hPerm

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
    apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
    assumption
  have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
    apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
    assumption
  exact h1.trans (List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans h2.symm

have hlen : l1.length = l2.length := by
    apply Eq.symm
    exact hPerm.length_eq
  rw [← List.Perm.insert_back]
  rw [← List.Perm.insert_back]
  exact hPerm.insert_cons elt
rw [← List.Perm.insert_of_mem hPerm (by simp [hidx1, hidx2]), List.Perm.insert_of_mem rfl (by simp)]

rw [← List.Perm.insert_of_mem hPerm (by simp), ← List.Perm.insert_of_mem (by rfl : l2.Perm l2) (by simp)]
      exact List.Perm.symm (List.Perm.insert_of_mem hPerm (by simp))

rw [← List.Perm.append_right_inj, ← List.Perm.append_right_inj]
      simp_all [List.Perm.insertNth]

rw [← List.Perm.append_right_inj, ← List.Perm.append_right_inj]
      simp_all [List.Perm.insertNth]

have h1 : l1.length = l2.length := hPerm.length_eq
  have h2 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).length = (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).length := by
    simp [List.insertIdx_length, h1]
  apply List.Perm.insert_of_mem
  · apply List.mem_insertIdx_self
  · apply List.Perm.mem_iff_mem.mpr hPerm
    apply List.mem_insertIdx_of_mem
    apply List.mem_of_length_le hidx1

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
        apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
      have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
      have h3 : (elt :: l1).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
        apply List.Perm.cons; exact hPerm
      exact h1.trans (h3.trans h2.symm)

rw [← List.Perm.append_right_inj, ← List.Perm.append_right_inj]
      simp_all [List.insertIdx_eq_take_drop]
      <;> apply List.Perm.take_drop_append

rw [← List.Perm.insert_inj_right hPerm]
      exact List.Perm.insert_elt elt idx1 idx2 hidx1 hidx2

rw [← List.Perm.insert_inj_right hPerm, List.insertIdx_eq_insert]
      simp [List.insertIdx_eq_insert, hPerm]

have h1 : (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (elt :: l1) := by
    apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
  have h2 : (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt).Perm (elt :: l2) := by
    apply List.Perm.insertIdx_eq_cons_perm
  exact h1.trans (List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans h2.symm

rw [← List.Perm.append_right_inj]
      simp [List.insertIdx_append, hPerm]
